relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The divine court gathered again, and the Accuser entered again among the heavenly beings.
The Accuser again came from roaming the earth.
Job still held integrity, and the test was named as destruction for nothing.
The Accuser claimed that bodily pain would reveal the limit of devotion.
Bone and flesh became the next field of testing.
A boundary remained: Job’s life was to be guarded.
Job’s body became covered in severe affliction.
He sat in ashes, scraping pain with broken clay.
His wife spoke from the edge of despair, questioning the value of holding integrity.
Job refused to make pain into false speech against the Divine.
His friends came intending sympathy and comfort.
They barely recognized him and entered grief with torn robes and dust.
Their best comfort began as silence: seven days and nights beside unbearable pain.
